milestone.name: method-surface hardening + literature-fidelity rewrite
milestone.goal: Bundle only APoZ/Mean-Activation/L1; move all other methods to custom registration and raise custom-method fidelity to 100% against literature.

decisions_locked.fidelity_policy: No method name should claim literature method unless algorithm/protocol is implemented faithfully.
decisions_locked.framework_consistency: PyTorch and Keras implementations must aggregate equivalent tensors/statistics (same scoring semantics).

current_findings.scope_mismatch: Global custom methods currently executed with scope='local' in experiments_custom_method_registration_minimal.ipynb loops.

notes: Core regressions were fixed in torch prunable-layer selection and global top-k masking.
Method fidelity still requires algorithmic rewrites, not only test pass.

next_actions: Constrain bundled method surface to APoZ/Mean-Activation/L1 only.
Refactor CHIP and L2 into custom-registration-only notebook implementations.
Rewrite NISP/SeNPIS/TIS/REPrune/ThiNet custom methods to paper-faithful procedures.
Align PyTorch/Keras scoring semantics one-to-one and add cross-backend parity checks.
Re-run notebook + tests and update fidelity report to v3 with post-fix evidence.
